title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/03/2025
Today, iron ore fluctuated downward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 777, down 0.58% for the day.Traders showed weak enthusiasm for selling; steel mills restocked as needed; and market transaction sentiment was average. In Shandong, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 777-780 yuan/mt, stable compared to yesterday's prices.
